hero.title: Get more out of your rental?
hero.subtitle: When your rental underperforms, it's almost always one of three things: your listing, your pricing, or your hosting skills. Boni helps you optimise all three.
hero.boniSpeech: Hi! I'm Boni. I help you attract more guests, get better reviews and set the right prices.

section.title: Three tools, one goal
section.subtitle: More bookings, better reviews, higher revenue

cta.title: Where do you want to start?

listingOptimizer.title: Listing Optimizer
listingOptimizer.description: Boni analyses all 12 sections of your listing and gives you a score, concrete improvements and ready-to-use rewritten texts.
features: Action plan: today, this week, this month

reviewMonitor.title: Review Monitor
reviewMonitor.description: Boni automatically reads all new reviews and sends you a weekly or monthly report with improvements and ready-made responses.
features: Choose your own day and time

prijscalculator.title: Price Calculator
prijscalculator.description: Enter your location and base price. Boni automatically calculates optimal prices for the whole year based on seasons, events and holidays.
